documents.tooltipText: Quotes, applications, loss runs and other files. Drag-and-drop to attach.

documentLinks.tooltipText: Web links (HTML proposals, benefits guides, etc.) for this account. Managed via the Document Links side panel; stored as JSON.

momentum_client_id.tooltipText: NowCerts/Momentum AMS insured database_id — dedup key

fein.tooltipText: Federal Employer Identification Number — commercial accounts only

agent_of_record_date.tooltipText: Date RSG became Agent of Record — synced from NowCerts

downloadsStatements.tooltipText: True if this carrier downloads commission statements — drives postingSource on Commission records

intel_run.tooltipText: Whether an intel pack has been run on this account

intel_underwriting_flag.tooltipText: Underwriting risk flags — may trigger declination or surplus lines

assessment_date.tooltipText: When Viktor last ran a full intelligence assessment on this account

risk_score.tooltipText: AI-generated risk score from Viktor assessment

coverage_gaps.tooltipText: AI-identified coverage gaps from Viktor assessment

key_findings.tooltipText: Full narrative intel written by Viktor

intel_sources.tooltipText: Comma-separated list of sources checked: LinkedIn, BBB, News, Website

account_score.tooltipText: Auto-calculated from policy count, premium, LOB diversity, tenure, and active ratio

totalAnnualPremium.tooltipText: Calculated by n8n — sum of all active policy premiums

policyCountActive.tooltipText: Calculated by n8n — count of active policies

gapCount.tooltipText: Calculated by n8n — total true gap flags

clv_current.tooltipText: Backward-looking CLV: annualCommission × tenureYears × grossMargin. What the relationship has been worth to date.

clv_projected.tooltipText: Forward-looking CLV from existing book: annualCommission × margin × (retention / (1 + discount − retention)). Excludes cross-sell.

clv_with_cross_sell.tooltipText: clv_projected + (gapCount × upliftPerGap × tier multiplier). Includes expected revenue from filling LOB gaps.

clv_annual_commission.tooltipText: Sum of commissionAmount across active policies that fed the CLV computation.

clv_tenure_years.tooltipText: Years between today and the oldest active policy's effective_date.

clv_retention_rate_applied.tooltipText: Retention rate used in the projection, looked up from score_tier via config clvRetentionByTier.

next_renewal_date.tooltipText: Calculated by n8n — earliest policy expiration

outreach_attempts_current.tooltipText: Reset each renewal cycle by n8n

gbEligibleEmployees.tooltipText: Total number of eligible employees in the group

gbLifeBenefitAmount.tooltipText: Basic life benefit amount per employee

gbVoluntaryBenefits.tooltipText: Aflac, voluntary life, accident, critical illness, etc.

momentumClientId.tooltipText: NowCerts/Momentum AMS insured database_id — used as sync dedup key

csrName.tooltipText: Assigned CSR from Momentum AMS (csrName field)

contactDriveFolderUrl.tooltipText: Optional override — contact-specific Google Drive folder URL

policy_number.tooltipText: Policy number — primary identifier for this policy record

momentumPolicyId.tooltipText: NowCerts/Momentum AMS policy databaseId — primary dedup key for sync. NEVER change this value once set.

line_of_business_raw.tooltipText: Original NowCerts / AMS line-of-business string before normalization.

line_of_business.tooltipText: Normalized line of business label (varchar — enum conversion is a separate pass).

expiration_date.tooltipText: Renewal trigger date — used by renewal pipeline automation

acceptedByAmsAt.tooltipText: Timestamp when AMS accepted the latest CRM correction payload.

acceptedByAmsBy.tooltipText: AMS user or integration identity that accepted the latest CRM correction.

amsLockState.tooltipText: CRM policy edit lock state controlled by AMS correction acceptance.

amsLockReason.tooltipText: Reason for current AMS lock state, including rejection detail when present.

insuredMomentumId.tooltipText: insuredDatabaseId from Momentum — used to resolve Account/Contact relation during sync

policy_health.tooltipText: Computed per-policy health: Urgent (<=15d / cancellation) > At Risk (>=15% rate spike / coverage drop / billing) > Renewing (status Up for Renewal / Renewing) > Expired (status Expired / Cancelled / Lapsed) > Active.

premiumAtRisk.tooltipText: Annual premium value at risk if policy lapses — used by renewal outreach automation

urgency.tooltipText: Auto-calculated by n8n renewal workflow based on days to expiration

last_contact_method.tooltipText: Set by renewal outreach automation after each email send

last_contact_date.tooltipText: Set by renewal outreach automation after each contact attempt

email_sequence_started.tooltipText: Set to true by renewal outreach automation after first email sent

renewals.tooltipText: Renewal pipeline records for this expiring policy

renewedFrom.tooltipText: Renewal records where this is the new/renewed policy

dateStart.tooltipText: When work started. Set automatically when the status first becomes "In Progress" — never entered by hand.

momentumTaskId.tooltipText: NowCerts task database_id — dedup key for bi-directional sync

sourceActivityLogId.tooltipText: Source ActivityLog ID for manual service triage deduplication

automationKey.tooltipText: Automation key for deduping generated tasks

taskSource.tooltipText: Where this task was created from — enables Account rollup

policyType.tooltipText: Line of business / policy type. Auto-populated from the linked Policy where possible.

policyNumber.tooltipText: Policy number this task concerns. Auto-populated from the linked Policy where possible.

carrier.tooltipText: Carrier for the policy. Auto-populated from the linked Policy where possible.

policyEffectiveDate.tooltipText: Policy period start. Auto-populated from the linked Policy where possible.

policyExpirationDate.tooltipText: Policy period end. Auto-populated from the linked Policy where possible.

refLink.tooltipText: Primary external link / portal needed to act on this task (e.g. carrier or audit portal).

refAccessCode.tooltipText: Access code / PIN / credential needed to complete the task.

refSupportContact.tooltipText: Support contact or vendor email for this task.

refNotes.tooltipText: Any other structured reference data needed to act on the task.

confirm1Label.tooltipText: Confirmation item 1 — the action that must be confirmed.

confirm1Note.tooltipText: How / when / by whom item 1 was confirmed.

confirmationProgress.tooltipText: Confirmation checklist progress (e.g. "1/2"). Maintained automatically by a hook.

managerNotes.tooltipText: Notes from the task creator / manager. Editable by the creator or a manager; read-only for the assignee.

policies.tooltipText: Policies this task concerns (1–5). For a COI, the picker is limited to the selected Insured's policies.

postingSource.tooltipText: Manual = agent posts payment received; AMS Download = carrier statement flows via NowCerts → Supabase → auto-post

reconciliationStatus.tooltipText: Lifecycle state used for commission reconciliation queueing

producer.tooltipText: Auto-populated from source record Assigned User — Lamar / Gretchen

writtenPremium.tooltipText: Auto-populated from Policy premiumAmount or Renewal renewalPremium

commissionRate.tooltipText: Auto-populated from Policy commissionRate — flagged if missing

estimatedCommission.tooltipText: Auto-calculated: writtenPremium x commissionRate — $0 and flagged if rate missing

postedAmount.tooltipText: Manually entered when carrier payment received

variancePercent.tooltipText: Auto-calculated: variance / estimatedCommission — flags large discrepancies

expectedPaymentDate.tooltipText: Manually entered or defaulted to 30 days after effective date

overdueFlag.tooltipText: Auto-set when status = Estimated AND expected payment date > 30 days past

ledgerExternalId.tooltipText: External ledger transaction ID written back after successful sync

ledgerSyncError.tooltipText: Latest external ledger sync error message

ledgerPayloadHash.tooltipText: Idempotency hash of the outbound ledger payload

ledgerKey.tooltipText: Deterministic ledger key to prevent duplicate commission records

documents.tooltipText: Quote letters, proposals, applications and other files. Drag-and-drop to attach.

name.tooltipText: Optional display title for this quote entry.

carrier.tooltipText: Legacy carrier name (text). Kept for backwards-compat; carrierAccount link is the new source of truth.

carrierAccount.tooltipText: Carrier Account (relationship link). Populate alongside carrier text; will fully replace varchar in a future deprecation pass.
